title: Somnia Awoken Fabric
description: A Minecraft mod that simulates the level while you sleep. Ported to Fabric
body:
# Somnia Awoken Fabric A port to fabric of [Somnia Awoken (By Su5eD)](https://modrinth.com/mod/somnia):
A Minecraft mod that simulates the level while you sleep, initially released in 2011.

## How it works Instead of skipping the night, the level is sped up while you sleep.
You can now sleep at any time, as long as you have enough fatigue, which you gain passively over time.
Be careful - getting too tired gives you negative effects.
![Simulation](https://imgur.com/TrNFgZz.gif)

## Credits & Licensing The original author of the mod is MALfunction84, who released it in 2011. Original thread [here](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/wip-mods/1438898-1-2-5-somnia-ssp-ml-1-4-x-wip). Around 2014, kingrunes ported the mod to newer minecraft versions 1.5, 1.6 and 1.7. Their thread is available via the [Wayback machine](https://web.archive.org/web/20150216055414/http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding/minecraft-mods/1291170-somnia-simulating-the-world-while-you-sleep). Somnia versions 1.10 and below make use of kingrunes' codebase, and are licensed under the [Somnia Mod License](https://github.com/Su5eD/Somnia/blob/mc-1.12.2/LICENSE). Somnia Awoken versions 2.0 and above use rewritten codebase by Su5eD, and are licensed under the [GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/Su5eD/Somnia/blob/mc-1.16/LICENSE). Somnia Awoken Fabric is based off Somnia Awoken 2.0, and is licensed under the [GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/alkyaly/Somnia-Fabric/blob/1.17-Fabric/LICENSE).
